name: chrX_Xq25_27_HSFX_SPANX_SD
description: Xq25-q28 cancer/testis antigen cluster harboring SPANX, GAGE, CSAG, MAGE-A and HSFX paralog families. Multiple tandem duplications of 5-50 kb at >95% identity; copy-number variable between males (SPANX gene family 1-5 copies). Cross-mapping with autosomal MAGE paralogs.

architecture.internal_structure: SPANX (5 copies), GAGE (8-11 copies), CSAG, MAGE-A, HSFX tandem clusters; reproductive expression.
